## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Testing

- [ ] `python3 -m pytest`
- [ ] `python3 -m compileall src scripts`

## Docs

- [ ] Updated `README.md` if needed
- [ ] Updated `README.zh-CN.md` if needed
- [ ] Updated `references/configuration.md` if needed

## Security Check

- [ ] No bot tokens, private chat ids, runtime databases, or local logs were added
